titleStmt.title: SII 4.253: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 253. (A.R. No. 24 of 1889). ON THE INSIDE OF THE NORTH PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The lines of the inscription begin with a circle resembling ananusvāra.śubhamastu . svasti . śrījayāReadºbhyudaya. bdhudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1435 nē śrīmukhasaṁvacharada caItra śu 5 lū śrīmaNmmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
vīrakruṣṇarāyamahārāyarū naṁmma paṭadalū śrīrāmacaṁdradēvara Amrutapaḍi naivēdyaAṁgaraṁgavaibhava nityanaimitikamāsapūje māsōchā
ha paṁcaparvamodalāda pu(ṁ)ṇyatithigaḷalū māḍuva mahāpūje naivēdyakū samarpisida kaḷasāpurada māgaṇige saluva voḷakōṭeya
grāma 1 soṁḍūrasīmege saluva tāḷūragrāma 1 Ubhayaṁ grāma 2 prākina grāmagaḷu nāriyasīmege saluva yiṭṭage
ya grāma 1 AUbhaḷadēvara kaṇuveya baḷiya muddāpurada grāma 1 kopaṇada sīmege saluva kuṭukanahaḷiya grāma 1 nāriyasīme
yaluRead nālvattanālku.nāvvattanākuviniyōgake saluva jāyanūra grāma 1 Aṁttu grāma 6 kaṁ saluva sakalasuvarnnādāya sakalabhattādāya
staḷadasuṁkaRead svāmya.sāmya taḷavāṟikeya roka bhata jōḍi birāḍa grāmagaḷa nīrabirāḍa Anupuhārikā yī modalāda yēnuṁṭādanu
sarvvamānyavāgi naṁma taṁde narasaṇanāyakavoḍeyarigū naṁma tāyi nāgāji Aṁmanavarigū pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi sūryagrāhaṇa puṇyakāla
daluThe sign generally used for long ā in the case of consonants is added here to the vowel A.Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi naḍava mariyādeyalu samarpisideU yī dharmakeThe sign generally used for longā in the case of consonants is added here to the vowel A.Ārobaru tappidare ta(ṁ)mma tāyitaṁdeya vāraṇāsiyalu koṁda
pāpadalu hōdavaru . gōhatya bra(ṁ)hmahatya śrīhatya bruṇahatya Akṛtigaḷa māḍida pāpakke hōdavarū .
Digital edition of SII 4.253 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
